positive: A mystical forest silhouette against a deep celestial gradient sky, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and hidden woodland creatures like stylized owls and rabbits. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, showcasing distinct, high-contrast, clean black lines defining the silhouettes (e.g., tree outlines, animal shapes). Use a limited color palette focusing on deep indigo, forest green, electric blue, and stark white bioluminescence accents. Ideal for screen printing or embroidery on dark apparel. Minimal detail within the silhouette shapes, maximum contrast between subject and background. Vector art style, highly detailed etching quality, dramatic volumetric lighting, ultra-fine linework, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry edges, low detail, amateur, photorealistic, gradient sky, noise, extra limbs, messy
